inputs.label: Number of Stops
inputs.businessContext: Total delivery or service stops on the route.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total delivery or service stops on the route.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Rotadaki toplam teslimat veya hizmet durağı sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der Liefer- oder Servicehalte auf der Route.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'arrêts de livraison ou de service sur la route.

inputs.label: Total Route Distance
inputs.businessContext: Total distance traveled for the route in kilometers.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total distance traveled for the route in kilometers.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Rota için kilometre cinsinden kat edilen toplam mesafe.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte zurückgelegte Strecke für die Route in Kilometern.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Distance totale parcourue pour la route en kilomètres.

inputs.label: Average Speed
inputs.businessContext: Average vehicle speed including traffic and stops.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average vehicle speed including traffic and stops.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Trafik ve duraklar dahil ortalama araç hızı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Fahrzeuggeschwindigkeit inklusive Verkehr und Stopps.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Vitesse moyenne du véhicule incluant le trafic et les arrêts.

inputs.label: Dwell Time per Stop
inputs.businessContext: Average time spent at each stop for loading/unloading.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average time spent at each stop for loading/unloading.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yükleme/boşaltma için her durakta harcanan ortalama süre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Zeit an jedem Halt für Be- und Entladung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps moyen passé à chaque arrêt pour le chargement/déchargement.
Coût du carburant par kilomètre parcouru.

inputs.label: Driver Hourly Rate
inputs.businessContext: Hourly wage cost for the driver.

businessContext_i18n.en: Hourly wage cost for the driver.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût horaire de la main-d'œuvre pour le conducteur.

inputs.label: Vehicle Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of vehicle used for the route.

businessContext_i18n.en: Type of vehicle used for the route.
businessContext_i18n.de: Art des für die Route verwendeten Fahrzeugs.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Type de véhicule utilisé pour la route.

inputs.label: Traffic Condition
inputs.businessContext: Expected traffic condition along the route.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected traffic condition along the route.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Condition de circulation attendue sur la route.

rules.message: Number of stops and total distance must be positive.
Average speed must be between 5 and 120 km/h.
Dwell time per stop must be between 0 and 120 minutes.
Refrigerated vehicles in heavy traffic may require additional fuel surcharge.

thresholds.alert: Fuel cost exceeds 500 currency units. Consider route consolidation.
Total travel time exceeds 8 hours. Driver may require rest break.
Stops per hour below 1.5. Route density is low; consider merging stops.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
